name: remote-config-validation-atomicity
description: Remote config validation for interdependent fields: why to reject the entire config object rather than clamping individual fields. TRIGGER when designing validation for remotely-tunable configuration objects with fields that constrain each other, when choosing between whole-object rejection vs. per-field clamping in a validation schema, or when debugging a service that behaved unexpectedly after a remote config push. Load when writing validation for any config that is served remotely and has cross-field constraints.
author: Anthropic
